description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a solid black material. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and a single, uniform seat cushion, both appearing plush and well-padded for comfort. Cylindrical bolster pillows are positioned at each end, resting against the straight, padded armrests that are level with the backrest. The armrests are broad and rectangular, matching the overall geometric design of the sofa. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and appear to be made of dark wood, providing subtle elevation and stability. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, giving the sofa a contemporary, minimalist aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern black two-seater sofa with straight armrests, plush back and seat cushions, and short dark wooden legs. The design is sleek, minimalist, and well-suited for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, padded armrest, the thickness of the back cushion, and the cylindrical bolster pillow.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both large back cushions, the single seat cushion, and the symmetrical placement of the armrests and bolster pillows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest, back cushion, and bolster pillow from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, unadorned back panel and the tops of the two back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and a single uniform seat cushion; two cylindrical bolster pillows at each end; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, rectangular armrests at seat height, fully padded and matching the sofa's upholstery, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered legs positioned at the corners, made of dark wood, exposed and providing minimal elevation.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
